note.zh: MiniMax M3(Qoder · Default)用仓库标准中文提示词一次生成的圈地智能体,未经人工修改。按案例规则策略文件不公开、仅注册运行,由维护者亲自执行,任何 bug 均不修复。自命名「暗影」。诊断:API 合规,两个种子均负(152:1171、177:979,圈地约 145/168 格),扩张保守,得分不到基线的六分之一。
note.en: One-shot Turf War agent by MiniMax M3 (Qoder, Default) from the repository's canonical Chinese prompt, no human edits. Per case rules the policy file is unpublished and no bug is ever fixed; this registers the maintainer-executed run. Self-named "暗影" (Shadow). Diagnosis: API-compliant, loses both seeds (152:1171, 177:979; ~145/168 captures); conservative expansion, under a sixth of the baseline's score.
